title: Poison Gas Devastates Zou
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on poison gas devastates zou within the Ten Days Before the Straw Hats Arrived storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: OH NO!! GAOO!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: How are they flying?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The starboard side of the ship has sustained damage!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: "Weather Egg"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hatch! Rain clouds!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: "Rain tempo" !!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Why is the weather changing only around them?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: And what's with all that mist and fog!!! I've lost sight of our enemy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WhoAA AAA^^!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You guys were awesome!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What a White- Knuckle Thrill!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: yeah, I'm not flattered at all, you jerks :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Awww, we didn't do anything that special :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...so after that, how many days did it take...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Until you reached Zou?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We reached it the very next day... apparently we were already pretty close to it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So then that was 10 days ago!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: But from what I could see...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The city at the Center of Zou had traces of even older damage...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: At least 2 weeks must have passed since it occurred.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...!! that's exactly right... this country was already in ruins 10 days ago.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: but for nami and the others to have arrived here that day...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We can't call it anything short of a miracle...!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: If it weren't for her courage and chopper's medicine and training...

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: Everyone in our mokomo Dukedom would have died...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And there would have been nothing we could have done to stop it....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Someone who works for the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...your wounds haven't completely healed yet, which means they must be recent.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Although I understand if you don't want to talk about it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...it's okay, we'll tell you everything. You all have the right to know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Everyone ...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: The Duke has awakened !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WHAT?!!! Really?! HOW SPLENDID!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I didn't think he'd ever wake up...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: After all he's gone through... I can't imagine how hard it was on him.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That's great!! I'm going to go check up on him right this minute!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Miyag!! Tristan!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yes, right away!!! This will be another great learning experience!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Miyagi- Sensei... you are showing a bit too much enthusiasm there...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: HRMMM?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Wanda!

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: Duke Inuarashi sends word...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: He would love to meet our Saviors .....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...Yes, immediately!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I'm so glad... truly I am...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Would you mind coming with us?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That's great, isn't it, Wanda!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Yeah, it's great and all... but who's this inuarashi guy?

summary: Poison Gas Devastates Zou: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
